title: My Book!
excerpt: So excited that the book I worked on for the better part of last year is done and available now in the Studio Calico shop ! I am ever so grateful for the fantastic contributors and team at Northridge Publishing.…
body: So excited that the book I worked on for the better part of last year is done and available now in the Studio Calico shop! I am ever so grateful for the fantastic contributors and team at Northridge Publishing. Thank you all!
